title: marcus-kochia littorea
intro: Marcus-kochia littorea, also known as Kochia scoparia, is a perennial herb native to Asia and parts of Europe, belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular choice for traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Marcus-kochia littorea include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Marcus-kochia littorea typically involve drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to create a decoction or tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
